casa.loc_desc: The cozy kitchen-living area of the Favilla-Mallow apartment. Herringbone oak parquet floor, modern white kitchen, round white table with ochre-yellow chairs, laptop, carta-da-zucchero sofa, baby toys scattered, cream-white walls, tall windows with soft Italian light.
casa.world_detail: The Favilla-Mallow apartment at Via delle Vesciche e dei Brufoli 18. Warm herringbone oak parquet flooring (spina di pesce) throughout the kitchen-living area. Modern Italian kitchen with minimalist white lacquered cabinets and brushed steel handles. A round white wooden dining table with four ochre-yellow chairs, a silver laptop and scattered papers on it. Light-blue-gray (carta da zucchero) fabric sofa in the living portion. Baby toys scattered on the floor near the sofa: colorful plastic rings, a soft ball, a small tambourine, a xylophone, and various plush toys. Tall white-framed windows let in soft Italian daylight. Walls painted cream/white. Family photos in simple frames on a shelf. Children's drawings on the fridge with many souvenir magnets from traveled places. A potted basil plant on the windowsill. A silver kettle and a wooden fruit bowl with apples on the countertop. Lived-in, warm, organized chaos of a young family.

casa_notte.loc_desc: The same apartment kitchen at night. Herringbone parquet floor dimly lit, kitchen suspiciously clean and perfectly ordered, soft warm lamplight, long shadows, an eerie calm replacing the daytime chaos.
casa_notte.world_detail: The same Favilla-Mallow apartment at night. Warm herringbone oak parquet flooring dimly lit. The kitchen is suspiciously clean and perfectly ordered — dishes put away, countertops wiped, no toys on the floor. Soft warm lamplight pools on the wooden table. The laptop is closed. Long shadows stretch across the cream walls. Tall windows show the dark street outside. An eerie calm has replaced the daytime chaos. Everything is in its place — too much in its place.

camera_notte.loc_desc: The bedroom at night. Herringbone oak parquet floor, wooden crib in white and natural wood with sleeping baby, double bed with cream linen, soft moonlight, quiet introspection.
camera_notte.world_detail: The bedroom of the Favilla-Mallow apartment at night. Warm herringbone oak parquet flooring. A simple wooden crib, white and natural wood tones, with white bedding where baby Lex sleeps peacefully. The crib is positioned right next to the double bed, attached to its side. A double bed with cream linen. Soft moonlight through the window, casting a gentle silver glow across the room. A single lampshade on a nightstand. Quiet, intimate, introspective atmosphere.

supermercato.loc_desc: The IperPassata supermarket in Nova Tutinia. Wide fluorescent-lit aisles of packaged goods, tall metal shelves with pasta cans and jars, shopping carts with baby seats, white tile floors, bright harsh supermarket lighting, the smell of bread and cleaning products, the weekend morning rush of families.
supermercato.world_detail: The IperPassata supermarket on a Saturday morning in Nova Tutinia, a typical Italian hypermarket. Wide aisles with bright fluorescent lighting reflecting off white tiled floors. Tall metal shelving units reaching head height, packed with colorful packages: pasta boxes in every shape, canned tomatoes stacked in precarious pyramids, jars of sauce in neat rows. Shopping carts with molded plastic baby seats, one containing a quiet baby boy with a pacifier and a teddy bear. The distant beep of checkout scanners. The smell of fresh bread from the in-store bakery mixing with the clean scent of floor polish. Weekend morning energy — families stocking up, pensioners doing their weekly shop, children running between the aisles. An ordinary, mundane, absolutely normal supermarket — where nothing unusual ever happens.

parco.loc_desc: Giardini Pubblici park, sunny morning. Green lawns, plane trees, gravel paths, playground with swings, gelato cart, baby stroller parked by a bench, families enjoying a peaceful Sunday.
parco.world_detail: Giardini Pubblici di Nova Tutinia, a sunny Italian public park. Wide well-maintained green lawns. Tall plane trees with pale bark cast dappled shadows on gravel paths. A small playground with a yellow slide and two swings visible in the background. Green-painted metal benches along the main path. A white gelato cart with a striped umbrella near the entrance. A modern lightweight baby stroller parked beside a bench, with a diaper bag hanging from the handle. Families with children, couples walking, the occasional jogger. Warm golden morning light. Birds chirping, children laughing in the distance. Everything looks perfectly normal, sunny, peaceful — a Sunday postcard.

boschetto.loc_desc: Dense wooded thicket inside the park. Tangled branches, wild undergrowth, sunlight shafts through leaves, mossy ground, exposed roots, abandoned stroller half-hidden. Tense secluded spot.
boschetto.world_detail: A dense small wooded thicket within the Giardini Pubblici park. Tangled low branches, wild undergrowth of ferns and brambles. Shafts of golden sunlight pierce through the canopy of leaves, creating dramatic light beams. Mossy ground, exposed tree roots breaking through the dirt path. An abandoned baby stroller half-hidden behind a bush, its wheel still slightly spinning. Completely isolated from the park bustle despite being just meters away. Tense, secluded atmosphere. The contrast between the sunny family park and this wild forgotten corner.

scuola.loc_desc: Italian elementary school classroom. Pale yellow walls with children's drawings, chalkboard, rows of wooden desks, tall windows with morning light, teacher's desk with coffee mug, chalk dust in sunbeams.
scuola.world_detail: An Italian elementary school classroom in Nova Tutinia. Pale yellow walls, one wall covered in children's colorful artwork and drawings. A large chalkboard at the front with faint traces of writing. Rows of small wooden desks with attached chairs, arranged in three columns. Tall windows with sheer curtains let in warm morning light. A teacher's desk at the front with papers, books, and a ceramic coffee mug. Chalk dust floats in the sunbeams. The floor is cream ceramic tile. Institutional but lively atmosphere, the quiet before the children arrive.

mare.loc_desc: Tyrrhenian coast beach resort (stabilimento balneare). Striped beach umbrellas in rows, blue-and-white deck chairs (sdraio), plastic tables, lido bar, fine light sand, calm clear sea, seaside promenade with low wall.
mare.world_detail: A typical Italian stabilimento balneare on the Tyrrhenian coast. Neat rows of blue-and-white striped beach umbrellas with matching deck chairs (sdraio) arranged symmetrically on the fine light sand. A small lido bar with a counter selling coffee, drinks, and sandwiches. Plastic tables and chairs near the bar area under a pergola. The sea is calm and clear, pale blue-green near the shore, darker blue toward the horizon. A paved seaside promenade (lungomare) separates the beach from the road, with a low stone wall on the beach side. The typical organized chaos of an Italian beach resort: families with children, the lifeguard tower, the sound of waves and distant laughter. By late afternoon the light turns golden, casting long shadows across the sand. The atmosphere shifts from lively daytime energy to the quiet golden calm of sunset.

centro_commerciale.loc_desc: GalaxiaMall, a large Italian shopping mall. Multilevel glass-and-steel structure, central atrium with LED ceiling lights, shiny tiled floors, escalators, indoor palm trees, chain stores and boutiques, food court smells, weekend families filling the corridors.
centro_commerciale.world_detail: GalaxiaMall, the largest shopping center in Nova Tutinia, on a Sunday afternoon. A cavernous modern space with a central atrium rising three stories, crowned by a glass dome and an intricate LED light installation that cycles through soft colors. Gleaming cream-white marble floors reflect the ambient light. Escalators crisscross the void diagonally, carrying shoppers between levels. Artificial palm trees in large ceramic planters dot the corridors. Chain store facades line every level: Zara, H&M, a Disney Store, a media electronics shop. The faint hum of the food court on the second floor mixes with distant arcade game sounds and the chatter of weekend crowds. Families everywhere — parents with shopping bags, children running ahead, grandparents stopping to rest on benches. The air smells of popcorn, cologne, and the faint plasticky scent of new clothes. Bright, clean, and thoroughly artificial — a cathedral of consumption.

parcheggio_mall.loc_desc: Large outdoor parking lot of GalaxiaMall. Expansive gray asphalt, white parking lines, rows of cars under the bright afternoon sun, heat shimmering off the pavement.
parcheggio_mall.world_detail: The sprawling outdoor parking lot of GalaxiaMall on a Sunday afternoon. An endless expanse of gray asphalt marked with neatly painted white parking lines. Cars parked in rows radiating outward from the mall entrance. The afternoon sun beats down on the pavement, creating heat shimmer above the car roofs. The mall's massive facade rises in the background, glass gleaming. A few shopping carts abandoned in the cart return corrals. The distant hum of traffic from the ring road. An ordinary, mundane parking lot — where something or someone might be watching.

asilo.loc_desc: Nova Tutinia Municipal Nursery. Colorful single-story building with a fenced courtyard, children's playground equipment, bright animal mural on the wall, morning light, welcoming but institutional atmosphere.
asilo.world_detail: The Asilo Comunale di Nova Tutinia, a municipal nursery school. A single-story building with cream-colored walls, one side covered in a bright cheerful mural of cartoon animals and flowers painted by local artists. A fenced courtyard with colorful plastic playground equipment: a small red slide, a blue rocking horse, scattered toys and balls on rubber safety matting. The entrance has a row of small coat hooks and cubbies visible through the glass doors. Potted plants by the doorway. Morning sunlight washes the facade with warm golden light. A teacher stands in the courtyard greeting parents, professional smile, tired but kind eyes. The building has that particular institutional warmth — functional, slightly worn, but genuinely loved by the staff. The air smells faintly of crayons, baby powder, and floor disinfectant. A new place on the map, full of possibility — and unknown variables.

scuola_corridoio.loc_desc: School corridor in Nova Tutinia elementary school. Pale yellow walls, cream ceramic tile floor, classroom doors along both sides, bulletin boards with children's artwork, tall windows at the end, fluorescent ceiling lights, institutional atmosphere.
scuola_corridoio.world_detail: The main corridor of the Nova Tutinia elementary school, quiet during an inspection. Long straight hallway with pale yellow painted walls, cream ceramic tile floor polished to a slight sheen. Classroom doors of dark wood line both sides, each with a small window set into the door and a brass number plate. Bulletin boards with children's colorful artwork and seasonal decorations at regular intervals. A row of coat hooks along one wall, empty during the school day. Tall windows at the far end let in afternoon light, casting long rectangles on the floor. Fluorescent ceiling panels provide even, cool illumination. The occasional notice or poster on the walls: fire drill procedures, parent-teacher meeting announcements. The floor recently mopped, a faint smell of disinfectant and chalk. Quiet, institutional, the kind of corridor where footsteps echo slightly. An oppressive silence broken only by the hum of the fluorescent lights and the distant drip of a leaky faucet from the bathroom.

scuola_bagno.loc_desc: School bathroom at Nova Tutinia elementary school. Small room with white ceramic tiles, two sinks with metal faucets, a mirror above each sink, toilet stalls with pale blue doors, a window near the ceiling, fluorescent light, cream tile floor with drain grate.
scuola_bagno.world_detail: A small school bathroom at the Nova Tutinia elementary school. Floor-to-ceiling white ceramic tiles on the walls, cream ceramic tile floor with a metal drain grate in the center. Two wall-mounted white ceramic sinks with individual chrome faucets, a rectangular mirror above each. Two toilet stalls with pale blue painted wooden doors and chrome handles. A small high window near the ceiling, frosted glass, letting in diffuse daylight. A single fluorescent ceiling fixture provides harsh white light. A metal soap dispenser mounted on the wall between the sinks, a paper towel dispenser next to it. The pipes under the left sink are exposed — an old chrome trap and rubber hose connection. The room is narrow, maybe 2x3 meters, with the door opening inward. When the door is closed and locked, the room feels like a cell. The floor drain grate in the center is where the water will eventually escape. A small trash bin in the corner.

palestra.loc_desc: Nova Tutinia municipal gym. Modern equipment, mirror walls, fluorescent lighting, rubber flooring, tapis roulant corner, weight racks, large windows, disinfectant and rubber smell, sparse weekday afternoon crowd.
palestra.world_detail: The Palestra Comunale di Nova Tutinia on a weekday afternoon. A functional municipal gym with pale gray walls and a full wall of mirrors on one side. Bright fluorescent ceiling lights cast even, cool illumination across the space. Black rubber mat flooring throughout. A row of treadmills and elliptical machines along the mirror wall, some in use by other patrons. A weight area with dumbbells and barbells in organized racks, with worn black weight plates. A workout mat area near the back wall. Large windows at the top of one wall let in afternoon light. The air smells of disinfectant, rubber, and faint sweat. An instructor in a staff shirt organizing equipment in the back. A few people working out quietly, each in their own bubble. Unremarkable, mundane, ordinary — a place where Favilla can just be anonymous, just another person.

strada_notte.loc_desc: Quiet street at night in Nova Tutinia. Old ochre apartment buildings, orange street lamps, dark third-floor window with watching silhouette, cobblestone pavement, tense mysterious stillness.
strada_notte.world_detail: A quiet Italian street in Nova Tutinia at night. A row of attached old apartment buildings with cream and ochre facades. Orange sodium street lamps cast warm pools of light on the empty cobblestone pavement. One specific third-floor window is dark — but a barely visible elderly woman silhouette stands motionless in the darkness, watching the street below. A blue shopping trolley is parked by a doorway. Tense, mysterious atmosphere. The stillness of a small town at night, hiding secrets.
